caption: A man wearing a grey t-shirt, a grey baseball cap, and black over-ear headphones speaks into a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. He is positioned in front of a dark, textured sound-absorbing wall. He has a tattoo on his right upper arm. The microphone is silver and grey, with the text "BlueMicrophone" visible on the boom arm. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in the same position, but his right arm moves. He begins with his arm resting, then lifts it and makes a sweeping gesture with his hand toward the right side of the frame, which creates a slight motion blur in the final images. He continues to speak into the microphone throughout the movement, maintaining a focused expression.
